description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a mix of traditional and modern design elements. The exterior walls are painted a deep green, contrasted by white window frames and a wooden front door. Large windows and a glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory extend from one side, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The interior is divided into several rooms, including a kitchen, dining area, bedrooms, and a central living room with visible furnishings. Wooden flooring and white interior walls dominate the inside, with some rooms featuring accent colors and built-in cabinetry. The roof is mostly flat with a transparent section over the sunroom, and the overall structure is compact and functional, suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story green bungalow with a glass sunroom, large windows, and a functional, well-furnished interior. The design blends traditional and modern elements, featuring a flat roof and open living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the central dining area with visible interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass-enclosed sunroom and the open-plan kitchen and living spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and the sunroom's full extension.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing bedrooms, bathrooms, and the transition from the main living area to private spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and a glass sunroom extension
